---
title: "Lecture 7: Data Cleaning, Importing/Exporting Data"
date: 2025-07-17
summary: "<strong>Data Cleaning and Wrangling, Importing/Exporting Data in R</strong>"
url_slides: 07-slides.qmd
url_code: https://github.com/brinsab/csp-materials/07-cleaning
page-layout: full
draft: false
---

**Summary**: {< meta summary >}  
**Slides**: [View Slides]({< meta url_slides >})  
**Code**: Copy and run in your console: `usethis::use_course("{< meta url_code >}")`

## Before Class

## Readings
